region.description: AWS region the queue lives in (e.g. us-east-1), used for SigV4 request signing.

access_key.description: AWS access key id used for SigV4 request signing. Never logged.

secret_key.description: AWS secret access key used for SigV4 request signing. Never logged.

session_token.description: Optional AWS session token for temporary/STS credentials, sent as X-Amz-Security-Token when set.

max_batch_size.description: Messages requested per ReceiveMessage call (MaxNumberOfMessages), clamped to 1-10.

visibility_timeout.description: Optional VisibilityTimeout override in seconds, clamped to 0-43200. Uses the queue's own default when unset.

attributes_to_return.description: Comma-separated list of MessageAttributeName values to request. Defaults to All.

max_polls.description: Maximum number of ReceiveMessage calls per Read, clamped to 1-100. A poll returning zero messages stops early.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
